description: First stable release. Productivity app with tasks, subtasks, calendar, events, Eisenhower Matrix, and self-hosted LAN deployment.

changelog.description: Renamed project from Finance Manager to Life Manager across all packages, docs, and UI
Added GET /api/health endpoint returning status, version, and DB connectivity
Added GET /api/v1/auth/export-data to download all user data as JSON
Added 404 Not Found page with navigation back to dashboard
Empty-state welcome panel shown on dashboard when no tasks exist
Added .env.example, appsettings.Production.example.json, backup/restore scripts, and PRODUCTION-SETUP.md guide
Replaced SpecKit with CLAUDE.md as single AI context file; archived SpecKit to _archive/speckit/
